# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

// main.ts - Deno Deploy application with dynamic module loading plugin system

// Plugin interface that all plugins must implement
interface Plugin {
  name: string;
  version?: string;
  init?: () => Promise<void> | void;
  execute: (input: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<Record<string, unknown>> | Record<string, unknown>;
  destroy?: () => Promise<void> | void;
}

// Plugin registry to keep track of loaded plugins
const pluginRegistry: Map<string, Plugin> = new Map();

// Load plugins from environment variables
async function loadPluginsFromEnv(): Promise<void> {
  // Environment variables should be in the format:
  // PLUGIN_PATHS=module1.ts,module2.ts,https://example.com/plugin.ts
  const pluginPaths = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_PATHS");
  if (pluginPaths) {
    const paths = pluginPaths.split(",").map((p) => p.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    for (const path of paths) {
      await loadPlugin(path);
    }
  }

  // Also support individual plugin env vars like PLUGIN_1, PLUGIN_2, etc.
  for (let i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
    const pluginPath = Deno.env.get(`PLUGIN_${i}`);
    if (pluginPath) {
      await loadPlugin(pluginPath.trim());
    }
  }
}

// Validate that the module path is allowed
function isAllowedModulePath(path: string): boolean {
  // Allow relative paths, absolute paths, and URLs
  // Block potentially dangerous patterns
  const blockedPatterns = [
    /^file:\/\/.*\/etc\//,
    /^file:\/\/.*\/proc\//,
    /^file:\/\/.*\/sys\//,
    /\.\.\//,  // Directory traversal
  ];

  for (const pattern of blockedPatterns) {
    if (pattern.test(path)) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  // Allow HTTPS URLs, relative paths, and jsr: imports
  if (
    path.startsWith("https://") ||
    path.startsWith("jsr:") ||
    path.startsWith("npm:") ||
    path.startsWith("./") ||
    path.startsWith("/") ||
    /^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\.ts$/.test(path)
  ) {
    return true;
  }

  return false;
}

// Dynamically load a plugin module
async function loadPlugin(modulePath: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; name?: string; error?: string }> {
  if (!isAllowedModulePath(modulePath)) {
    const errorMsg = `Module path not allowed: ${modulePath}`;
    console.error(errorMsg);
    return { success: false, error: errorMsg };
  }

  try {
    console.log(`Loading plugin from: ${modulePath}`);
    const module = await import(modulePath);

    // Check if the module exports a default plugin or a named 'plugin' export
    const plugin: Plugin = module.default || module.plugin;

    if (!plugin) {
      const errorMsg = `Module ${modulePath} does not export a valid plugin (needs default or named 'plugin' export)`;
      console.error(errorMsg);
      return { success: false, error: errorMsg };
    }

    if (!plugin.name || typeof plugin.execute !== "function") {
      const errorMsg = `Plugin from ${modulePath} must have 'name' (string) and 'execute' (function) properties`;
      console.error(errorMsg);
      return { success: false, error: errorMsg };
    }

    // Initialize the plugin if it has an init method
    if (typeof plugin.init === "function") {
      await plugin.init();
    }

    pluginRegistry.set(plugin.name, plugin);
    console.log(`Plugin loaded successfully: ${plugin.name} (v${plugin.version || "unknown"})`);
    return { success: true, name: plugin.name };
  } catch (error) {
    const errorMsg = `Failed to load plugin from ${modulePath}: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`;
    console.error(errorMsg);
    return { success: false, error: errorMsg };
  }
}

// Unload a plugin
async function unloadPlugin(pluginName: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const plugin = pluginRegistry.get(pluginName);
  if (!plugin) {
    return false;
  }

  if (typeof plugin.destroy === "function") {
    await plugin.destroy();
  }

  pluginRegistry.delete(pluginName);
  console.log(`Plugin unloaded: ${pluginName}`);
  return true;
}

// Execute a plugin by name
async function executePlugin(
  pluginName: string,
  input: Record<string, unknown>
): Promise<{ success: boolean; result?: Record<string, unknown>; error?: string }> {
  const plugin = pluginRegistry.get(pluginName);
  if (!plugin) {
    return { success: false, error: `Plugin not found: ${pluginName}` };
  }

  try {
    const result = await plugin.execute(input);
    return { success: true, result };
  } catch (error) {
    const errorMsg = `Plugin execution error (${pluginName}): ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`;
    console.error(errorMsg);
    return { success: false, error: errorMsg };
  }
}

// Create JSON response helper
function jsonResponse(data: unknown, status = 200): Response {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS",
      "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
    },
  });
}

// Load initial plugins from environment
await loadPluginsFromEnv();

// Main request handler
Deno.serve(async (req: Request): Promise<Response> => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;

  // Handle CORS preflight
  if (req.method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, {
      status: 204,
      headers: {
        "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS",
        "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
      },
    });
  }

  // Health check / info endpoint
  if (path === "/" || path === "/health") {
    return jsonResponse({
      status: "ok",
      service: "Deno Deploy Plugin System",
      loadedPlugins: Array.from(pluginRegistry.entries()).map(([name, plugin]) => ({
        name,
        version: plugin.version || "unknown",
      })),
      endpoints: {
        "GET /": "Health check and plugin list",
        "GET /plugins": "List all loaded plugins",
        "POST /plugins/load": "Load a plugin dynamically",
        "POST /plugins/load?module=<path>": "Load a plugin from query parameter",
        "DELETE /plugins/:name": "Unload a plugin",
        "POST /plugins/:name/execute": "Execute a plugin",
        "GET /plugins/:name": "Get plugin info",
      },
    });
  }

  // List all loaded plugins
  if (path === "/plugins" && req.method === "GET") {
    const plugins = Array.from(pluginRegistry.entries()).map(([name, plugin]) => ({
      name,
      version: plugin.version || "unknown",
      hasInit: typeof plugin.init === "function",
      hasDestroy: typeof plugin.destroy === "function",
    }));
    return jsonResponse({ plugins, count: plugins.length });
  }

  // Load a plugin
  if (path === "/plugins/load" && req.method === "POST") {
    // Check query parameter first
    let modulePath = url.searchParams.get("module");

    // If not in query params, check request body
    if (!modulePath) {
      try {
        const body = await req.json();
        modulePath = body.module || body.path || body.modulePath;
      } catch {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Invalid request body. Expected JSON with 'module' field or use ?module= query parameter" }, 400);
      }
    }

    if (!modulePath) {
      return jsonResponse({ error: "No module path provided. Use 'module' in JSON body or ?module= query parameter" }, 400);
    }

    const result = await loadPlugin(modulePath);
    if (result.success) {
      return jsonResponse({
        message: `Plugin '${result.name}' loaded successfully`,
        plugin: result.name,
      });
    } else {
      return jsonResponse({ error: result.error }, 400);
    }
  }

  // Load multiple plugins at once
  if (path === "/plugins/load-batch" && req.method === "POST") {
    try {
      const body = await req.json();
      const modules: string[] = body.modules || [];

      if (!Array.isArray(modules) || modules.length === 0) {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Expected 'modules' array in request body" }, 400);
      }

      const results = await Promise.all(
        modules.map((modulePath: string) => loadPlugin(modulePath))
      );

      return jsonResponse({
        results: results.map((r, i) => ({
          module: modules[i],
          ...r,
        })),
        loaded: results.filter((r) => r.success).length,
        failed: results.filter((r) => !r.success).length,
      });
    } catch {
      return jsonResponse({ error: "Invalid request body" }, 400);
    }
  }

  // Plugin-specific routes
  const pluginMatch = path.match(/^\/plugins\/([^/]+)(?:\/(.+))?$/);
  if (pluginMatch) {
    const pluginName = decodeURIComponent(pluginMatch[1]);
    const action = pluginMatch[2];

    // Skip if it's a reserved route
    if (pluginName === "load" || pluginName === "load-batch") {
      return jsonResponse({ error: "Not found" }, 404);
    }

    // Get plugin info
    if (!action && req.method === "GET") {
      const plugin = pluginRegistry.get(pluginName);
      if (!plugin) {
        return jsonResponse({ error: `Plugin '${pluginName}' not found` }, 404);
      }
      return jsonResponse({
        name: plugin.name,
        version: plugin.version || "unknown",
        hasInit: typeof plugin.init === "function",
        hasDestroy: typeof plugin.destroy === "function",
      });
    }

    // Unload plugin
    if (!action && req.method === "DELETE") {
      const unloaded = await unloadPlugin(pluginName);
      if (unloaded) {
        return jsonResponse({ message: `Plugin '${pluginName}' unloaded successfully` });
      }
      return jsonResponse({ error: `Plugin '${pluginName}' not found` }, 404);
    }

    // Execute plugin
    if (action === "execute" && req.method === "POST") {
      let input: Record<string, unknown> = {};

      // Parse input from request body
      try {
        const contentType = req.headers.get("content-type") || "";
        if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
          input = await req.json();
        }
      } catch {
        return jsonResponse({ error: "Invalid JSON in request body" }, 400);
      }

      // Also merge query parameters as input
      for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
        input[key] = value;
      }

      const result = await executePlugin(pluginName, input);
      if (result.success) {
        return jsonResponse({
          plugin: pluginName,
          result: result.result,
        });
      }
      return jsonResponse({ error: result.error }, result.error?.includes("not found") ? 404 : 500);
    }
  }

  // 404 for unmatched routes
  return jsonResponse({ error: "Not found", path }, 404);
});
